settings.title: Five Hundred Spa Days Given to Caregivers
settings.excerpt: The people who look after everyone else rarely get looked after, so we set out to change that.
settings.body:
A few years ago we started quietly offering free treatments to local caregivers, the people who spend their days tending to others. This month we passed five hundred of them.

Once a month we close an afternoon and welcome nurses, carers, and family members who look after a loved one full time. No cost, no catch, just a few hours to themselves.

They give so much and ask for so little. If you know someone who fits, or you are that someone, reach out and we will find them a spot.
